---
title: "Quick guide"
toc: false
---

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/build_pages.py — do not edit by hand. Edit meta.yml and re-run the script. -->

::: {.quick-grid}
[<span class="qg-img qg-noimg">no image yet</span> Akashiwo](classes/akashiwo/index.qmd){.qg-item}

[<span class="qg-img qg-noimg">no image yet</span> Asterionellopsis](classes/asterionellopsis/index.qmd){.qg-item}

[![Chaetoceros](classes/chaetoceros/ideal/high_mag_cam-1744682015955205-3962763148808-38952-003-1984-424-315-320_rawcolor.png){.qg-img} Chaetoceros](classes/chaetoceros/index.qmd){.qg-item}

[![Eucampia](classes/eucampia/ideal/high_mag_cam-1744681252334368-3199139638296-31315-001-2094-192-205-348_rawcolor.png){.qg-img} Eucampia](classes/eucampia/index.qmd){.qg-item}

[<span class="qg-img qg-noimg">no image yet</span> Gyrodinium](classes/gyrodinium/index.qmd){.qg-item}

[<span class="qg-img qg-noimg">no image yet</span> Pennate](classes/pennate/index.qmd){.qg-item}

[![Pseudo-nitzschia](classes/pseudo-nitzschia/ideal/high_mag_cam-1744681982168009-3928966534136-38614-008-1460-240-324-892_rawcolor.png){.qg-img} Pseudo-nitzschia](classes/pseudo-nitzschia/index.qmd){.qg-item}

[<span class="qg-img qg-noimg">no image yet</span> Rhizosolenia / Proboscia](classes/rhizosolenia_proboscia/index.qmd){.qg-item}

[<span class="qg-img qg-noimg">no image yet</span> Thalassionema](classes/thalassionema/index.qmd){.qg-item}

:::
